# kemp_ldap_endpoint (Resource)

Manages an LDAP endpoint on a Kemp LoadMaster for authentication.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "kemp_ldap_endpoint" "corp" {
  name      = "CORP_LDAP"
  ldap_type = "starttls"
  server    = "ldap1.corp.example.com ldap2.corp.example.com"

  revalidation_interval = 120
  referral_count        = 2
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) **Required.** Name of the LDAP endpoint. Forces replacement if changed.

### Optional

- `ldap_type` (String) Optional. Connection type: `unencrypted`, `starttls`, or `ldaps`. Defaults to `unencrypted`.
- `referral_count` (Number) Optional. Number of LDAP referrals to follow. Range: 0–10. Default: 0.
- `revalidation_interval` (Number) Optional. How often (in seconds) to re-validate LDAP connectivity. Range: 10–86400. Default: 60.
- `server` (String) Optional. Space-separated list of LDAP server addresses.
